ab: aunini u mʉcʉkʉhlʉ?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: hlimusasala ku mʉcʉkʉhlʉ.
en: I came on foot.

ab: likihli misaini a hliutungusa u mʉcʉkʉhlʉ?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: hlimutungusu a ku likihli salia kikucu mʉcʉkʉhlʉ.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: aunini u musala tapakia?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: malilikihli a ama’a na ihlaku kiʉlʉsʉ musala.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: auninia kana’ana ma kaupuapangʉ musala ariatʉkʉrana?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: hlimutungusu a kana’ana likihli umarua hluvu’u miararuma musala ariatʉkʉrana.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: aunini a tamuuahlaina musa pu’a hlatʉngʉ?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: mulilikihli a kana’ana musa pu’a hlatʉngʉ.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: aunini u musa sasaruana Laan-I na?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: mutungusu aku ’avangʉ musa sasaruana Laan-I na.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: aunini a kana’ana musa sasaruana Laan-I na?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: mutungusu a kana’ana saliamiapihlihli musa sasaruana Laan-I na.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: likihli misaini a hliutungusa kana’ana musa takau?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: hliutungusa kana’ana likihli umarua hluvu’u musa takau.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: mutungusu i kana’ana likihli apuhlu musa taitu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: a’ʉ, mutungusu a kana’ana likihli apuhlu musa taitu.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: mutungusu i kana’ana likihli apuhlu musa taitu?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ku, mutungusu a kana’ana salia miapihlihli musa taitu.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: maru i ma liliunga utatungusa likihlisalia?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: maru, muahlaluhlalusu ia kumakitaci kia utatungusa likihlisalia.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: ma ninau a mataingalʉ masahli aatʉ utatungusa likihli umarua hluvu’u miararuma?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: naani uka’a utatungusa na likihli umarua hluvu’u miararuma, mutatungusu sangalʉ likihli mahlisarʉ.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: atainini a rahlu a isa maci mutungusu likihlisalia miungu ariatʉkʉrana na?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: laihlaulima utuatapusana miungu ariatʉkʉrana.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: atainini a rahlu a isa miungu taiciu?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: ucani pakiaturua miungu taiciu.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: rahlu a i maci mulikihli musa Uulai na?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: taia’ai ucani pakiaturua.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: atainini a rahlu a isa macu u mutungusu likihli umarua hluvu’u miararuma na miungu salia ku?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: tumua mapuahlʉ utuatapusana.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: macahlia u i mulikihli umarua sapahlʉ na?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: macahlia ku mulikihli umarua sapahlʉ na.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: maru u i likihli umarua ’urai?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: marua ucani likihli ku umarua ’urai.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: maru u i likihli umarua ’urai?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: uka’a likihliku umarua ’urai.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
